query:
SELECT r.id, r.businessOwnerId, r.rating, r.comment, r.clientLocalId, bo.businessName
FROM reviews r
JOIN business_owners bo ON bo.id = r.businessOwnerId
ORDER BY r.businessOwnerId, r.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute
